TC-0001.TestDescription: User should be able to search for a product.
TC-0001.Preconditions: User is on the Shop App.
TC-0001.ExpectedResult: Search results for 'Laptop' should be displayed.

TC-0002.TestDescription: User should be able to add a product to the cart.
TC-0002.Preconditions: User is on the Shop App and has searched for a product.
TestSteps: 1. Click on the 'Add to Cart' button for the first product in the search results.
TC-0002.ExpectedResult: 'Smart Watch' should be added to the cart.
TC-0002.ActualResult: 'Smart Watch' is added to the cart.
